race.comment: CIPHERTEXT (8) resumed in a rich Magic Millions feature and found it too tough. Was just nudged out here before the break and at Ipswich the run prior. They read well and she has early speed required to clear the wide gate. Has been freshened and will go close with average luck.  RALEWAY (5) debuts for the Campton yard and has looked sharp in a string of trials. Has the blinkers on signalling intent. At home and a bold run is on the cards. DRINKWATER (3) resumes for Toby Edmonds and his trials suggest he going to return much improved. Has the handy 2kg claim and keep very safe. POISED TYCOON (4) peaks and is heading in the right direction. Maps for a soft run and the shorter sprint shouldn't bother. Has to be considered.
